sections.paragraph:
Original: יערשׁיה

Transliteration: ya‛ăreshyâh

Phonetic: yah-ar-esh-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Jaresiah = "whom Jehovah nourishes"
  1. a Benjamite, one of the descendants of Jehoram

Origin: from an unused root of uncertain signification and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
